title: Correction: Corrigendum: Differential neural mechanisms for early and late prediction error detection
abstract: Scientific Reports 6: Article number: 24350; published online: 15 April 2016; updated: 11 April 2017 In this Article, an additional affiliation for Paul F.M.J. Verschure was omitted. The correct affiliations for Paul F.M.J. Verschure are listed below: SPECS, Universitat Pompeu Fabra, Barcelona, Spain.
